name: Digi Golf Club
address: 1412 N Valley Mills Dr Suite 108, Waco, TX 76710
about: Digi Golf Club is Waco's first indoor golf simulator venue, offering a state-of-the-art facility for golfers to enjoy the game year-round. The club provides a flexible and convenient alternative to traditional golf, with no time commitment required. Featuring a climate-controlled environment, it allows members to play regardless of weather conditions, ensuring accessibility 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The facility is designed for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to seasoned players, focusing on practice, play, and skill improvement through their exclusive membership program.
why_golfers_like_it: Play on 'bucket-list' courses without time commitment
State-of-the-art simulators for all skill levels
